description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark wooden handle with a slight curve and a blue grip section near the base. The head of the axe is made of dark metal, with a broad, angular blade on one side and a flat hammer-like poll on the opposite end. The blade has a distinctive, slightly curved cutting edge and a pronounced beard, giving it a functional and aggressive appearance. The handle appears to be ergonomically shaped for a secure grip, with a rounded end to prevent slipping during use. The mounting of the blade to the handle is traditional, with the head fitted securely atop the handle. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on the axe.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle, blue grip, and a broad, dark metal blade with a hammer poll. The design is functional and robust, suitable for chopping or striking tasks.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from a three-quarter angle, highlighting the curved wooden handle, blue grip, and the full profile of the broad, angular blade.
description_view_1: A direct top-down view showing the circular cross-section of the handle and the thickness of the axe head.
description_view_2: A mirrored three-quarter view, displaying the opposite side of the blade and the ergonomic curve of the handle.
description_view_3: A direct front view, emphasizing the width of the blade and the alignment of the handle beneath it.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a rounded end and a blue painted grip section; ergonomic, oval cross-section for secure holding.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, angular steel blade with a single curved cutting edge, pronounced beard, and a flat hammer poll on the opposite side.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted atop the handle.
